title: State Library of Louisiana
doc_html:
§633.  State Library of Louisiana

As used in the compact, "state library agency", with reference to this state, means the State Library of Louisiana.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 216, §1; Acts 1991, No. 938, §2.

§633.  State Library of Louisiana

Added by Acts 1968, No. 216, §1; Acts 1991, No. 938, §2.
